programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: After learning that their victim, Maya, is still alive, three masked maniacs return to finish the job. With nowhere to run and no one to trust, Maya finds herself in a fight for survival against psychopaths who'll kill anyone who stands in their way.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Before his retirement, a bounty hunter (The Rock) must locate his boss' son (Seann William Scott), who is searching for a priceless artifact in the Amazon.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: When her partner falls off the grid and another top agent is compromised, a desk-bound CIA analyst volunteers to go deep undercover as the world's newest and unlikeliest secret weapon.

programme.desc: Lord John Grey is put in a precarious position; William struggles to understand a surprising revelation.

programme.desc: Brianna fights against a dangerous plot threatening her family; Roger gains insight from an unexpected meeting; Ian and Rachel's relationship advances significantly.

programme.sub-title: Ye Dinna Get Used To It

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A woman finds herself in big trouble when a cartel leader forces her to do his dirty work to save her kidnapped friend. Determined to get away, she must now play a dangerous game to outwit the gang -- and the DEA agents who suspect her of complicity.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A beautiful cheerleader (Megan Fox) gains an insatiable appetite for human flesh after a hungry demon takes control of her body.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: In order to get a breather from their meddling sister-in-law (Gabrielle Union), three men pay a playboy (LL Cool J) $5,000 to romance her.

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: A Manhattan playboy (Eddie Murphy) gets a new corporate boss (Robin Givens), and she treats him the way he has always treated women.

programme.title: Movie

programme.desc: Otis and Howard rescue Andy, who has been taken prisoner by a pair of desperate bank robbers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Inarticulate Goober grows a beard and suddenly turns into a verbose philosopher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The town's new doctor is shunned by all the Mayberry citizens.

programme.desc: Andy and four of his level-headed friends and relatives are taken in by a con man's get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.desc: Andy looks forward to eating a few snacks and spending an evening alone in the house; but he finds he must eat three spaghetti dinners cooked by three thoughtful friends.

programme.desc: Andy visits Barney at the Raleigh police department and makes a hero out of his bumbling former deputy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A celebrity chef comes under suspicion in the murder of a TV network executive when Fontana and Green learn that the two were having an affair and the chef's cooking show was about to be canceled.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: While investigating a woman's murder, Fontana and Green uncover a cult that encourages sexual relations with children, and Borgia determines to put away its mesmerizing leader (Deborah Hedwall).

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A promiscuous lawyer ends up bludgeoned to death in her office, and detectives treat her former lovers as suspects until DNA evidence points to a co-worker.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Falco (Michael Imperioli) must tread lightly when they discover links between a powerful police commissioner and the murders of an infamous porn actress and a maverick publisher.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The shooting of a Panamanian jockey sends Fontana and Falco into the colorful world of horse racing; they learn that the animal's owner used stolen funds for the purchase.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Falco make an arrest after a blaze kills a firefighter; the discovery of a charred pistol leads them to reopen the investigation into an old murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A commuter train strikes an SUV parked on the tracks, leaving 11 dead; Fontana and Falco sift through the wreckage in search of clues until they find a depressed construction worker who claims he meant to commit suicide, not homicide.

programme.title: True Crime Story: It Couldn't Happen Here
programme.desc: A desperate single mother is arrested for shoplifting and thrown into a small-town jail; less than three months later she winds up dead after her pleas for help are dismissed for 19 hours.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Borgia consider making a deal with an ex-convict in order to save an abducted five-year-old girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green seek the aid of Detective Olivia Benson; they discover a money-laundering scheme involving a mother-daughter team Benson had dealt with in a past case.

programme.desc: A desperate single mother is arrested for shoplifting and thrown into a small-town jail; less than three months later she winds up dead after her pleas for help are dismissed for 19 hours.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A criminal makes a startling deathbed confession; Detective Fontana reopens a 10-year-old case file concerning the murder of a 12-year-old girl.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when a man is killed by a car bomb before he can disconnect his incapacitated wife's feeding tube.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives learn that a murdered prostitute was actually an undercover reporter trying to expose a brutal gang.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse practitioner with a social agenda faces charges when an abusive young mother accused of murder suddenly dies in her jail cell; detectives learn she may have been sterilized, without knowing it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church; Paul follows leads from Gary, Ind., to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced humankind and many of its sacred sites.
